scripts.agent:dev: npm run build --workspace @learnaire/openai-agents-harness && npm run start --workspace @learnaire/openai-agents-harness --
scripts.glean:readiness: npm run build --workspace shared && node scripts/generate_glean_readiness_map.mjs
scripts.reportability:agent-insights: npm run build --workspace shared && node scripts/generate_reportability_decision.mjs --report-context agent_insights --output docs/contracts/reportability/examples/org-northstar-agent-insights-reportability-decision.json
scripts.reportability:skills: npm run build --workspace shared && node scripts/generate_reportability_decision.mjs --report-context skills_reporting --output docs/contracts/reportability/examples/org-northstar-skills-reportability-decision.json
scripts.reportability:mcp: npm run build --workspace shared && node scripts/generate_reportability_decision.mjs --report-context mcp_reporting --output docs/contracts/reportability/examples/org-northstar-mcp-reportability-decision.json
